title: Case-Specific Private-Lab Blocker Register v0

sources.label: Multiple Myeloma Synthetic Case-To-Cure Pipeline v0
Multiple Myeloma Roadmap Public Task Queue v0

limitations: Does not provide eligibility guidance, expanded-access guidance, monitoring guidance, or publication authorization for any person.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.
Does not contain real case data, private records, identifiers, dates tied to a person, images, notes, reviewer identities, private record paths, or re-identification keys.
Does not complete any private-lab task or human-gated decision.
Does not authorize public case processing, packet assembly, generated claims, ranking, recommendation behavior, patient matching, trial matching, or publication workflow.
Does not make any public artifact expert-reviewed or publication-ready.
Does not require credentials, paid APIs, account changes, restricted datasets, clinician decisions, sponsor decisions, regulatory decisions, or institutional decisions.
